snippet.title: Director Rob Reiner says he has proof four men killed JFK | NewsNation Prime
snippet.description:
Rob Reiner, the legendary actor and director known for beloved movies like "When Harry Met Sally?" and "The Princess Bride," is now addressing the JFK assassination. He joins “NewsNation Prime,” to talk about his new podcast, "Who Killed J.F.K.?" with journalist Soledad O'Brien, which aims to reveal the truth surrounding the death of Kennedy. The 10-part series is currently underway, and according to Reiner, it will eventually identify the multiple shooters involved in the assassination. 
#RobReiner #JFK #JFKAssassination #WhoKilledJFK
For more on the full interview, read here: https://www.newsnationnow.com/crime/rob-reiner-proof-four-men-jfk/

snippet.title: A Masonic Bible? Are you ready to see the truth? #mastermason #bible #freemasonry 👀🤫
snippet.description:
Are you ready to take a look inside a REAL Master Mason's Bible?  

IMPORTANT: This is a SHORT so yes, there are pages that got skipped over.  Those pages are simply a Masonic family tree, and some various Bible study guides. The SCRIPTURE inside is the King James Version, and is unedited from the original KJV text.  This particular book DOES NOT have Egyptian Gods at the back.  Some versions DO have that, but they are there not for worship, but as part of the study guides that compare ancient religions and symbols to modern ones in much the same way that a college course might study the same things.  It is to help us better understand the history of the Holy Land, not a call to worship "old gods". 

You can watch the FULL PAGE by PAGE video here: https://youtu.be/sWWu6hmalIc

You can purchase this exact Bible here: https://masonicbibles.com/collections/products/products/master-mason-edition

Threatening messages will be reported and your account maybe suspended.

If you think Masons worship Lucifer, you are another foolish victim of the Taxil Hoax.  Learn the truth HERE: https://youtu.be/6KnYLbYofZ8

Brother Masons, make sure you comment.  😛😝

snippet.title: Popcorn Sutton Jam 2023 Moonshiners Pam Sutton, Tickle, JB Rader, Mark Ramsey, Danielle, Tony, Kelly
snippet.description:
The 2023 Popcorn Sutton Jam https://www.facebook.com/pcorn423/ was an incredible event put on by Pam Sutton, wife of the late legend Popcorn Sutton, the Godfather of Moonshine. It was a 2-day weekend event with so many moonshiners including Mark Ramsey of Mark & Digger, Moonshiner Tony from West Virginia, Moonshiner Legend JB Rader, Moonshiner Kelly, Shine Girl, Cooter & Diddle, and Tickle of course! Tim Smith https://timsmithspirits.com was on a Smugglers Run for Moonshiner Josh but he's planning on being there for the 2024 event. Hopefully Moonshiner Howard https://moonshinerhowardt.com will be there too!

video by me.. G Social Media https://gsocial.media

Or you'll be able to DIVIDE any big number by any two digit number in less than a minute. Or SQUARE any two digit number in 10 seconds. Try then believe.

I have SHORTCUTS of Algebra, Geometry, Word Problems, any topic that's covered in GMAT, GRE, or SAT.

🎁 Enjoy my gift to you, FREE eBook: “How To Calculator Percentages In Your Head” at https://guinnessandmathguy.mykajabi.com/pl/2147639130

With weekly long-form videos and daily shorts packed with math tricks, brain-boosting activities, and visual learning, your confidence and skills will grow in no time.

I’m a 5-time Guinness World Record holder and I can’t wait for you to explore all the tools, tips, and tricks I’ve built for passionate learners.

To get BrainGym membership for ONLY $1, click: https://guinnessandmathguy.mykajabi.com/brain-gym-math-edition

For 1-1 sessions with me, WhatsApp me at +971 50 480 9954.

To explore our online courses, go to: https://guinnessandmathguy.mykajabi.com/our-online-courses

snippet.title: Yellowstone | Teeter’s Craziest Wildcard Moments
snippet.description:
Watch Yellowstone Streaming Now on Peacock:  https://pck.tv/3X3WXsa 

From the second Teeter (Jen Landon) joined Dutton Ranch, she’s been roping caddle and stealing hearts. And while you can’t always understand what Teeter’s saying, you can bet it’s as good as gold. So saddle up as we jump into Teeter’s best wildcard moments! 

Synopsis: A ranching family in Montana faces off against others encroaching on their land. - Oscar and Emmy winner Kevin Costner is the marquee attraction of the ensemble cast in this drama series, starring as the patriarch of a powerful, complicated family of ranchers. A sixth-generation homesteader and devoted father, John Dutton controls the largest contiguous ranch in the United States. He operates in a corrupt world where politicians are compromised by influential oil and lumber corporations and land grabs make developers billions. Amid shifting alliances, unsolved murders, open wounds, and hard-earned respect, Dutton's property is in constant conflict with those it borders -- an expanding town, an Indian reservation, and America's first national park.

#Peacock #Yellowstone #Teeter

Peacock is your go-to for hit movies, TV, live sports, and more. With the streaming service from NBCUniversal, you can watch new movies from theaters, current hits from NBC and Bravo, nonstop action from WWE, Premier League, Big Ten, and tons of other sports. Plus, stream exclusive Originals, NBC News, and your faves like The Office, Suits, Modern Family, and Yellowstone. Peacock is currently available to stream within the United States.
